name: python3-elastic-transport
title: python3-elastic-transport
summary: Transport utilities shared by the Elastic client libraries
description:
Transport utilities shared by the Elastic client libraries
This library was lifted from elasticsearch-py and then transformed
to be used across all Elastic services rather than only Elasticsearch.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-elastic-transport because Transport utilities shared by the Elastic client libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-elastic-transport as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-elastic-transport with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-elastic-transport --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
